spaceflight.title: Watch live: First Celeste launch
spaceflight.summary: On 25 March, the first two satellites of the Celeste LEO-PNT in-orbit demonstration mission will lift off aboard Rocket Lab’s Electron rocket from the company’s Māhia Launch Complex in New Zealand.

spaceflight.title: Live coverage: SpaceX to launch 29 Starlink satellites on Falcon 9 rocket from Cape Canaveral
spaceflight.summary: Liftoff of the Starlink 10-62 mission from pad 40 at Cape Canaveral Space Force Station is scheduled for 10:47 a.m. EDT (1447 UTC). The rocket will fly on a northeasterly trajectory.
